description:
The universal dashboard for embedded systems.

Serial Studio is an open source, cross-platform telemetry dashboard and
real-time data visualization tool. It supports input from serial ports,
Bluetooth Low Energy (BLE), MQTT, and TCP/UDP sockets, allowing data acquisition
from embedded devices, external software, and networked services.

Serial Studio runs on Windows, macOS, and Linux. It is suited for telemetry
monitoring, sensor data analysis, and real-time debugging in educational,
hobbyist, and professional environments.
